NERDY FICTION
Books About

About

What is Nerdy Fiction?

Nerdy Fiction is a small imprint experimenting with a simple question: what if a novel didn’t end at the page? What if every chapter were staged like a film — backdrops, characters, weather, score — and you, the reader, were the projector?

Every book here is presented as a visual novel: scene-by-scene, with art and motion underneath the prose. Nothing to install. No algorithm to feed. Just a story, rendered in your browser.

The Reading Experience

Click, tap, or press Space to advance through scenes. Hold the line, breathe with the beat, let the backdrop settle. The story will wait for you.

What’s Coming

We’re starting with Ordinary Gods, Book One of The Chosen Ones. New chapters publish on a rolling cadence and the RSS feed is the surest way to catch them.

— The Nerdy Fiction Team

© 2026 Nerdy Fiction. All stories original.
